title: Retreive List of All Dropdown ids in A Specific Column

posts.author: booey811 (Gabriel Barr)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey guys!

Do we know if there is currently/going to be an easy way to generate a list containing all options from a dropdown column, primarily showing text values and their associated ids?

Currently I have to add all options (108 and counting!) to an item and query the column value, which is fine but was just wandering

Look forward to hearing from you!

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @booey811,

Unfortunately at this time we don’t have a way of generating those values based on a list - I know it’s a bit of a manual process it’s something we’re hoping to include in the future.

-Daniel

posts.author: booey811 (Gabriel Barr)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dsilva,

No worries, and thanks for the response
